title: Process Integration Manager (f/m/d)
required_skills: Strong cross-process experience in SAP implementation projects
Experience in Engineer to Order (ETO) or project-driven manufacturing environment
Translating complex SAP technical concepts to business explanations
Stakeholder management across engineering, operations, finance, service, and IT
bonus_skills: Experience in international and matrix organisations
Natural facilitation and conflict resolution skills
matched_skills: Cross-functional stakeholder management: HSBC 6-workstream coordination across Product, Engineering, Marketing, C-suite
Risk escalation and governance: HSBC PMO risk management and escalation
Structured problem-solving and process coordination: multiple roles
Stakeholder facilitation: HSBC programme coordination, ECE cross-team meetings
core_responsibilities: Lead and coordinate cross-process SAP integration topics across ETO value chain
Govern ETO process flows within SAP across Engineering, Sourcing, Production, Logistics, Finance
Identify process integration gaps and ensure scalable process design within SAP template
Moderate cross-functional workshops across multiple process houses
Ensure data ownership and governance across master data domains
Proactively identify risks, integration gaps, and cross-process dependencies
Prepare change requests for governance bodies
recommended_emphasis: HSBC cross-workstream governance and risk escalation as programme integration experience
Cross-functional facilitation across Product, Engineering, Marketing at HSBC
summary: Score 26.7 (poor match). This role requires deep SAP implementation and ETO manufacturing process expertise — highly specialised technical knowledge Boru does not have. While cross-functional coordination skills transfer, the core requirement of SAP S/4HANA integration and manufacturing process knowledge represents a fundamental gap. Not recommended.
